case_title: MELODEE CHEN VS. TOHA QUAN et al

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MELODEE SERVED APR-29-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOMI,INC.,A UTAH CORPORAATION
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ANY TIME ON THOSE 3 DEFENDANTS WERE PROPERLY SERVED (SEE P.O.S. ENTERED ABOVE) IF NO MOTION FILE BY THEM.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CHEN, MELODEE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, MELODEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUAN, TOHA AKA " JIMMY" QUAN WONG, ANA Y.N. TOMI,INC.,A UTAH CORPORAATION $384,641.00 PRINCIPAL, $9,621.29 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $394,554.79, JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. AGAINST ALL DEFENDANTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY IN THE AMOUNT OF $359,641; JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. AGAINST DEFT. TOHA QUAN AND ANNA WONG JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY IN THE AMOUNT OF $25,000, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
